mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `bank`.`board` (user_id, board_type, title, content,view_count,created_at,updated_at) VALUES ( #{board.userId}, #{board.boardType}, #{board.title}, #{board.content}, #{board.viewCount}, #{board.createdAt}, #{board.updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT `board_id` AS `boardId`, `user_id` AS `userId`, `board_type` AS `boardType`, `title` AS `title`, `content` AS `content`, `view_count` AS `viewCount`, `created_at` AS `createdAt`, `updated_at` AS `updatedAt` FROM `bank`.`board` WHERE `board_id` = #{boardId}

SELECT `board_id` AS `boardId`, `user_id` AS `userId`, `board_type` AS `boardType`, `title` AS `title`, `content` AS `content`, `view_count` AS `viewCount`, `created_at` AS `createdAt`, `updated_at` AS `updatedAt` FROM `bank`.`board` WHERE `board_type` = #{boardType} ORDER BY `board_id` DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT `board_id` AS `boardId`, `user_id` AS `userId`, `board_type` AS `boardType`, `title` AS `title`, `content` AS `content`, `view_count` AS `viewCount`, `created_at` AS `createdAt`, `updated_at` AS `updatedAt` FROM `bank`.`board` WHERE `board_type` = #{boardType} ORDER BY `board_id` DESC LIMIT 4;
